name: AMOLED dark theme
description: Makes the dark theme fully pure-black (AMOLED): backgrounds and surfaces/cards/bars become #000000. Dark mode only; borders, dividers and branded fills are kept for readability.

name: Block listings
description: Hides Avito offers from blacklisted adverts or sellers and adds a blacklist manager (import/export compatible with the Ave Blacklist extension).

name: Bypass anti-tamper
description: Stubs TBank's native RASP executor calls and neutralizes tamper flag reporting.

name: Disable Adjust
description: Disables Adjust attribution manifest entry points.

name: Disable AppMetrica
description: Disables AppMetrica and legacy Yandex Metrica SDK entry points.

name: Disable AppsFlyer
description: Disables AppsFlyer install referrer and attribution manifest entry points.

name: Disable Firebase telemetry
description: Disables Firebase telemetry collection flags and DataTransport sender entry points.

name: Disable freeRASP
description: Disables the freeRASP mobile security SDK startup.

name: Disable Google Analytics
description: Disables legacy Google Analytics manifest entry points.

name: Disable MyTracker
description: Disables MyTracker manifest entry points.

name: Disable RuStore metrics
description: Disables RuStore metrics manifest entry points.

name: Disable Sentry telemetry
description: Disables Sentry telemetry by turning off SDK auto-init and clearing the DSN.

name: Disable telemetry
description: Disables Avito first-party clickstream analytics and Avito's direct Adjust telemetry wrapper.

name: Disable update prompts
description: Prevents Avito's force-update screen opener from launching update screens. Toggleable in Настройки Morphe.

name: Morphe settings
description: Adds a "Настройки Morphe" entry to Avito's settings that hosts the configuration for the other Morphe patches.

name: Remove ads
description: Disables Avito ads by removing ad SDK entry points and short-circuiting commercial banner loading.

name: Remove Ozon ads
description: Removes Ozon ad widgets, banner carousels, video ads, and PDP promo blocks.

options.title: Hide recommendation grids
options.description: Removes recommendation grids from product, cart, profile, and favorites screens.

name: Remove TBank ads
description: Removes TBank stories and promotional surfaces.

name: Remove Wildberries ads
description: Removes Wildberries home banners, grid banners, promo headers, product recommendations, and lottery popups.

options.title: Hide recommendation grids
options.description: Removes recommendation grids from cart and product screens.

name: Spoof emulator status
description: Spoofs emulator state through common Build, QEMU file, command, and system property checks.

name: Spoof install source
description: Spoofs package installer checks to report Google Play as the install source.

name: Spoof USB debugging status
description: Spoofs USB debugging and related developer settings through common Android APIs.

name: Spoof VPN status
description: Spoofs VPN state through common Android network APIs.

name: UI tweaks
description: Optional interface tweaks, each toggleable in Настройки Morphe: single-row home categories, hide the "Подписки" tab in Избранное, hide installments (Рассрочка) and the "Спросите у продавца" block on offers, expand descriptions by default (no "Читать далее"), and hide the Avi assistant tab in the bottom navigation.
